title: Hell Froze Over Evangelion on Cartoon Network
display_title: Hell Froze Over Evangelion on Cartoon Network
wikitext:
[]: Hell Froze Over (Evangelion on Cartoon Network)             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 02, 2005 5:39 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/article.php?id=6949 ...

[]: Re: Hell Froze Over             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sat Jul 02, 2005 7:08 pm cain luppus wrote: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/article.php?id=6949 ...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sat Jul 02, 2005 7:25 pm Dammit! I was just about to post this! It could be worse. My guess is that Evangelion will no doubt go to Adult Swim. No way will it go on Toonami. If it's on Adult Swim there's actually a good chance it may not even be edited. Probably a little bit. The body of Asuka's mom swinging from the rafters will probably get the axe. Rei I being choked will no doubt get a lot cut. There's probably some other stuff too. Perhaps the slaughter of Unit-03 might be edited. But that one's hard to call. It's just an Eva after all and not a person.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jul 02, 2005 7:54 pm Phaze wrote: Adult Swim is pretty light when it comes to editing. Have you seen Robot Chicken lately? If they can show babies being slaughtered by helicopter blades, I doubt they'll have any problems with Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sat Jul 02, 2005 8:30 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Phaze wrote: Adult Swim is pretty light when it comes to editing. Have you seen Robot Chicken lately? If they can show babies being slaughtered by helicopter blades, I doubt they'll have any problems with Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jul 02, 2005 8:53 pm Sometimes I think there are people whos job it is to watch television 24 hours a day, and write complaints to broadcasters in a disturbingly successful attempt to censor society.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Jul 02, 2005 8:58 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Sometimes I think there are people whos job it is to watch television 24 hours a day, and write complaints to broadcasters in a disturbingly successful attempt to censor society.

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Sat Jul 02, 2005 10:08 pm Get ready for an influx of newbies. *Rolls ups sleeves* I am so looking foward to this. I'm optimistic about how it'll be edited. I mean I've seen Paranoia Agent in its entirety and that show had a lot of un-kid-friendly scenes. They also showed the beginning part of the third episode which had a woman sounding out a psuedo-orgasm. It was shown off-screen, but still, that's a huge leap in censorship on AS.

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Sat Jul 02, 2005 10:15 pm Phaze wrote: True. Infanticide is one thing, but naked peoples?! Actually, I don't recall any explicit nudity with the exception of the two movies (I find it hilarious how they added nipples to the Rei clones in DaR. That's a job I'd like to have.)

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 02, 2005 10:51 pm If I remember correctly, you never really see the nipples, it's more of an implied nudity.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 3:45 am ok about the nipples, I have platinum 6 with episode 23 and 23'. and I used to have Death and Rebirth. ok in episode 23 they don't show the nipples, it's implied nudity. in 23' however, they show the nipples. and in death and rebirth once again they show the nipples. so if it's aired on TV there won't be any nipples to edit out since episode 23 didn't show them. And damn those angry close minded people that think just because a show is animated it's supposed to be some friendly family show like Madagascar and some of that other crap. it's because of them shows are so cencored on Tv :(

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 8:30 am RubberSoul wrote: Get ready for an influx of newbies. *Rolls ups sleeves* I am so looking foward to this.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Jul 03, 2005 1:06 pm If they try to show this on toonami like they did with those few episodes a couple years back I'm going to have to take out a six pack of woopass on them! So it'd better be on adult swim. I can only imagine the horrible things that would happen to the show if they tried to put it on toonami :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 2:35 pm I didn't see it but I heard horror stories like Misato was drinking root beer instead of beer and she was wearing a swimsuit in the bathtub how dare they censor the great Misato!!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jul 03, 2005 6:01 pm When I hear things like that, I am glad I don't have cable anymore. Considering what they did to the two episodes they did show, why would you want to watch any others they put on? Also remember that when they show it, it will be dubbed. So that already makes it not worth watching.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 6:07 pm Why is it not watching just because it's in english. I've never watched it in Japanese before. I've ONLY watched the dub. I'm used to it and it's fine to me. I don't get why people dont like it so much. I think it's waaaay better to actually watch it as you would like any other show, without having to read the whole show. plus the dub of end of evangelion rules. it's got swears in it and stuff, it makes it way cooler. LOL this is going to turn into a evangelion dub vs sub thing..

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Jul 03, 2005 6:12 pm Why is it not watching just because it's in english. I've never watched it in Japanese before. I've ONLY watched the dub. I'm used to it and it's fine to me. I don't get why people dont like it so much. I think it's waaaay better to actually watch it as you would like any other show, without having to read the whole show. plus the dub of end of evangelion rules. it's got swears in it and stuff, it makes it way cooler. LOL this is going to turn into a evangelion dub vs sub thing..

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 6:17 pm Yeah I know they didn't translate it very well, from reading people's comments on message boards and stuff, but I just like to sit down and watch it in my own language better. but everyone has their own way of watching stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 7:13 pm rob_of_the_genesis wrote: Yeah I know they didn't translate it very well, from reading people's comments on message boards and stuff, but I just like to sit down and watch it in my own language better. but everyone has their own way of watching stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Jul 03, 2005 8:00 pm To tell you the truth I thought the dub was pretty good. The two voices I actually like better in English were Gendo and Shinji.
